description: A developer accidentally committed sensitive API keys and database credentials to the 'main' branch of the TailwindTraders repository. The offending commit has the message 'Add API keys and database credentials for deployment' and added the file 'config/secrets.json'. Revert this commit and ensure the fix is merged into the 'main' branch so that 'config/secrets.json' is removed from the repository. Login credentials: Docker / GymAnything123!

metadata.bad_commit_message: Add API keys and database credentials for deployment
